**The GOP is ALL IN on this Nevada Senate race , team:**
* After President Trump came to Nevada last month to fundraise for GOP Sen. Dean Heller, Heller had his **best fundraising quarter EVER.**

* A Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC **IS POURING $11.2 MILLION** into ads against Democrat Jacky Rosen.

* A recent poll shows that this race to decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court is **NECK AND NECK****.**

**It's clear: If the election were held today, we could lose the race that Nate Silver says Democrats likely ****NEED to win if we want to take back the Senate from Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.**
But right now, we're not raising enough to keep pace with the GOP - so we're counting on you to help us close the gap. name: BREAKING@bobcasey.com
subject: 🚨 Trump coming to PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e60e7/51dbcc2a/194768dc/3a6678d/650547827/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Team -- our opponent's been busy this week.

On Monday, Vice President Mike Pence came to town to boast about his friend and Bob's opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, while attacking Bob Casey for fighting against this administration's disastrous agenda.

On Tuesday, Lou Barletta spent the evening rubbing elbows with Kellyanne Conway and other Republican leaders in Washington.

This morning, we found out that President Trump will be campaigning with Lou Barletta next week _right here in Pennsylvania_.

**_[Pennsylvanians deserve a senator who answers to them, not the Washington elite. Send this administration a message: donate $5 or more to keep Pennsylvania blue.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180725_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Bottom line: this administration wants to flip as many Senate seats as they can, especially with a Supreme Court nominee on the line. They will do anything to replace Bob Casey -- who stands up for working families no matter what -- with someone who votes with the president 99% of the time.

**Trump is getting ready to attack Bob, so we need to be prepared to fight back. Can you donate today to help re-elect Bob Casey?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180725_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180725_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
When will the Republicans in the legislature stop trying to strip the constitution of checks and balances?
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b36/2fde7c66/46cf6f72/156827d0/3541356871/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-specialsession?refcode=em18_180725_session_fnd_gq_ful__tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&source=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx")

Have you heard the news out of Raleigh this week, friend?

You don't have to take it from us -- look at some of the leading stories on Legislative Republicans' latest nonsense: [](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b36/2fde7c66/46cf6f72/156827d3/3541356871/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-specialsession?refcode=em18_180725_session_fnd_gq_ful__tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&source=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx")

They know that their ideas are so unpopular to North Carolinians, they have to try to mislead their own voters.

**[They're trying to deceive you, plain and simple. Roy is committed to helping break the majority -- let him know you have his back. name: Steve Chabot
subject: Are the Democats Going to Take Back the House This Fall?
body:
Are the Democrats Going to Take Back the House This Fall? No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Are the Democrats Going to Take Back the House This Fall?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Washington political pundits (virtually all liberals) have been predicting a Democrat takeover for a while now. The most recent to join the chorus is Larry Sabato of the University of Virginia's Center for Politics. He now says Democrats are "soft favorites" to take over the House of Representatives. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Trump and Putin in Helsinki](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-d/)
This week on the blog I'm discussing President Trump's meeting in Helsinki with Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as breaking down President Trump's comments following. Click below to read more.
[Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Is Roe Finally Gonna Go?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-u/)
Monday night President Trump selected Judge Brett Kavanaugh to replace Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. I think this was an excellent pick. And it brings up the discussion, is there a potential for Roe to be overturned? I'm talking about it in this week's blog. Click below to read more.
[Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Socialist Gets Elected, and A Vacancy on The Supreme Court](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjgiudl-kujkulhluu-n/)
There were two things which happened last week - one of them was a pretty big deal, and the other was a really big deal. Click below to read more.

On a separate note, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Independence Day. God Bless America! clean_body: Are the Democrats Going to Take Back the House This Fall? No Images? The Washington political pundits (virtually all liberals) have been predicting a Democrat takeover for a while now. The most recent to join the chorus is Larry Sabato of the University of Virginia's Center for Politics. He now says Democrats are "soft favorites" to take over the House of Representatives. Click below to read more. Previous Weekly Posts This week on the blog I'm discussing President Trump's meeting in Helsinki with Russian President Vladimir Putin as well as breaking down President Trump's comments following. Click below to read more. Monday night President Trump selected Judge Brett Kavanaugh to replace Anthony Kennedy on the U.S. Supreme Court. I think this was an excellent pick. And it brings up the discussion, is there a potential for Roe to be overturned? I'm talking about it in this week's blog. Click below to read more. There were two things which happened last week - one of them was a pretty big deal, and the other was a really big deal. Click below to read more. On a separate note, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Independence Day. God Bless America! | | | ---|---|--- 2300 Montana Ave, Suite 306, Cincinnati, OH 45211

subject: Sign the National Petition to Confirm Judge Brett Kavanaugh
body:
_Please see a special message from our sponsor._ | | [](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=Qqya9nRraLQdlKCBdBkqEA)
---
| Fellow American, [**I urge you to immediately add your name to Family Research Council Action’s National Petition to Support President Trump’s Supreme Court Nominee, Judge Brett Kavanaugh.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=w_fJYCOjrcwa51PLirVzrQ) Your input is vitally important as we fight to ensure that President Trump’s pro-family, pro-freedom, originalist nominee is confirmed to the Supreme Court in a timely manner. Family Research Council Action (FRC Action) is helping to lead the fight on Capitol Hill and in the grassroots to support President Trump, who has lived up to his campaign promise of publicly vetting and nominating candidates to the nation’s highest Court. **Now, we need your help to ensure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed to the Supreme Court, despite vicious political pressure from the Left to block his nomination.** [**It all starts with your signature on this national petition today. Simply click here to add your name.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=XVMYP7e0Cr2_C8H60ZZf3Q) | [**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=pFhtE58jmHe4__ZD6CBv2w)
---

More than 80 percent of Evangelical Christian voters supported President Trump in the 2016 election and stated clearly that the Supreme Court was a major reason for doing so.
Mr. Trump proved himself worthy of his voters’ trust by keeping his promises with the nomination of Judge Neil Gorsuch. Now, he is building on that legacy with the nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh.
**It is now up to you and me to ensure that President Trump has the support he needs in the Senate to confirm this justice and add another originalist to the court — one who will interpret the Constitution by its original meaning, as the Founders intended.**
Unfortunately, in the eyes of Democrats on Capitol Hill, this makes Judge Kavanaugh a dangerous extremist who poses a major threat to their radical liberal agenda.
That’s why they have promised to lock arms and block his confirmation by any means necessary. But, they need two Republicans to vote with them in order to successfully stop Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation.
[**We MUST rally together and show them that the American people elected President Trump. He has chosen his nominee, and now we must stand behind him to confirm Judge Kavanaugh. Please help us do that right now by signing the National Petition and urging all of your friends and family members to do the same.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=BPglfcEgZH_M1s6FWUQ53Q)
Here at FRC Action, we're working every day to rally our allies on Capitol Hill and our grassroots activists around the country. And right now, this nomination fight — and supporting the president — is a top priority.
The liberals are bound and determined to block Judge Kavanaugh. Not because they care about our Constitution, but because they have contempt for Donald Trump, the people who elected him, and the biblical values you and I hold dear.
**Every seat on the Supreme Court is absolutely vital to our nation’s future.**
And I firmly believe that during the next few years, we will be able to stand up for life, religious liberty, and family values by adding another originalist to the Court.
[**Please stand with FRC Action as we fight to secure this Supreme Court seat and defend the values that have made our nation great. Sign the National Petition to Support President Trump’s Supreme Court Nominee, Judge Brett Kavanaugh, right away, and urge all of your friends and family members to do the same.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuZ2l2ZXdvcmtzLm5ldC9mZmZmL3NpZ25fbmF0aW9uYWxfcGV0aXRpb24vMThFMjVH&K=rMAaXttwdDVGBSRaqiIQhw)
Thank you so much for your help.
God bless,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
| | | | **FRC Action**
801 G Street NW, Washington, D.C. 20001
[Contact FRC Action](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA3LTUyM2QzN2VlZjAwODRiMzFhYWQ5YmQ1YjFiNWI1Y2I1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZnJjYWN0aW9uLm9yZy9nZXQuY2ZtP2M9VEUmYW1wO3RyYWNrPTAmYW1wO3JjPUZSQ0FfQ09OVEFDVCZhbXA7Zj1BTDE3TDAyJmFtcDtlbWFpbD17ZW1haWxfYWRkcmVzc30&K=CEmFjKGigmkiyBED87lK8Q)

Peter, Last week I said I'd let you know when the next big endorsements came in. We didn't know it would be this soon! **In the last few days, I've been endorsed by MoveOn and the Indivisible Project**. These are both huge votes of support from grassroots organizations with the ability to mobilize volunteers and donors. **MoveOn has 11,000 members in the Texas 10th, and 99% of them supported my endorsement**. The organization is committed building a world with a place of honor and dignity for everyone, and that values equality, sustainability, true justice, and love. **I am honored to receive the support of an organization with such a beautiful and powerful mission. ** **The Indivisible endorsement is equally meaningful.** Thousands of Indivisible groups across the country have been working since 2017 to resist the Republican agenda, from the Muslim Ban to attacks on health care. I have been lucky enough to work with several Indivisible organizations, including Indivisible TX-10 and local groups in Cypress, Bastrop, Austin, Cedar Park, and Katy. These activists are essential to the Blue Wave we are building in Texas! name: Kate Ramstad
subject: The kind of forward thinking we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
I have some exciting news to share! In her second term, Gina will make Universal Education and Job Training a reality for all Rhode Islanders -- **every hardworking Ocean State resident will have access to the education and job training they need to build a good career.**
This is the kind of forward-thinking policy we need in Rhode Island. **But Gina 's opponents are falling over each other to criticize her vision of a more equitable society.** They are threatening to tear down our hard-won progress and putting thousands of good jobs at risk.
**Our July fundraising deadline is coming up in just FIVE days.[Can you donate now to keep Gina in office, and keep Rhode Island's comeback going?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0f2/5e076a9e/54078d2f/14426700/2314701494/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180726")**
Thank you,
Kate

clean_body: Hi friend, I have some exciting news to share! In her second term, Gina will make Universal Education and Job Training a reality for all Rhode Islanders -- every hardworking Ocean State resident will have access to the education and job training they need to build a good career. This is the kind of forward-thinking policy we need in Rhode Island. But Gina 's opponents are falling over each other to criticize her vision of a more equitable society. They are threatening to tear down our hard-won progress and putting thousands of good jobs at risk. Our July fundraising deadline is coming up in just FIVE days. "" Thank you, Kate Kate Ramstad Finance Director PS: "" \------- Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited. Friends of Gina Raimondo PO Box 40794 Providence, RI 02940

subject: A major bipartisan win in Congress
body:
| |
---
The White House • July 26, 2018
## **The Day Ahead**
• President Donald J. Trump and Ivanka Trump visit Iowa, where they will lead a discussion on developing America’s workforce. [Watch live at 12:30 p.m. ET.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) • The President then travels to Granite City, Illinois, where he will celebrate the expected return of 800 American steel jobs. [Watch live at 3:40 p.m. ET.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# A major bipartisan win in Congress
**Republicans and Democrats came together** yesterday to deliver a signature piece of President Trump’s workforce agenda: reauthorization of the Perkins Career and Technical Education Act. For years Congress has tried unsuccessfully to modernize the program, which will help more than 11 million students and workers with technical and vocational education. **President Trump had urged Congress to act.** “Congress should reauthorize #PerkinsCTE and ensure the American workforce remains stronger than EVER!” the President tweeted this week. The White House, led by Ivanka Trump, was closely involved in shepherding the legislation on Capitol Hill. **It’s been a flagship month for workers** , with America in the midst of its longest streak of uninterrupted job growth ever recorded. Last week, President Trump launched the National Council for the American Worker, which will focus on retraining efforts to make sure every citizen can take full advantage of this historic jobs boom. [President Trump: “I applaud Congress for its tremendous, bipartisan effort.”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-president-passage-legislation-reauthorize-carl-d-perkins-career-technical-education-act/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Get the facts:** [How the Administration is equipping American students and workers](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-taking-action-equip-american-students-workers-skills-need-succeed/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Zero tariffs, zero barriers, and zero subsidies
**As a candidate,** Donald Trump promised to make America a much tougher negotiator on the world stage. “We have the worst trade deals in the history of the world. We gave away our country, but we’re taking it back for our workers,” the President said last month in Minnesota. **Yesterday, the President’s tough stance** paid off with a dramatic win, especially for America’s farmers. Standing alongside European Commission President Jean-Claude Juncker, President Trump announced that “we agreed today, first of all, to work together toward zero tariffs, zero non-tariff barriers, and zero subsidies on non-auto industrial goods,” a move that “will open markets for farmers and workers.” **The importance can’t be overstated**. The European Union’s $1 trillion trade flow with the United States is the largest economic relationship in the world. Together, America and the EU account for 830 million citizens and more than half of the world’s GDP. “If we team up, we can make our planet a better, more secure, and more prosperous place,” President Trump said. [Watch President Trump’s announcement from the Rose Garden.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ID6WeLDzZOc) **In the headlines****:** [President Trump announces concessions from EU on soybeans, energy, tariffs](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI2LjkzMDA5MDExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNi45MzAwOTAxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU5MjMwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2018/07/25/trump-announces-trade-concessions-from-eu-officials-on-soybeans-energy-tariffs.html)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump and President Jean-Claude Juncker of the European Commission deliver joint statements in the Rose Garden** | July 25, 2018

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8rq8srS5Oz8VR_rf41upsYHerjrhM7vBIXuf5249Nw=/ERkeQsLtRpqN0G-bm2T-vDRpG9rBSVf2vNw_S3YS3jU=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Here at Team Davis we're getting ready for our day of action happening this Saturday and planning our campaign strategy for the next three months.

But how many people we'll be able to reach depends on how much money we raise this month -- so meeting our fundraising goal is crucial.

**[Will you be one of the grassroots supporters who helps us out? Chip in $3 or more before our final end-of-month deadline before the primary and help us keep up the momentum.](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8rq8srS5Oz8VR_rf41upsYHerjrhM7vBIXuf5249Nw=/ERkeQsLtRpqN0G-bm2T-vDRpG9rBSVf2vNw_S3YS3jU=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Deciding where we'll canvas, who we'll talk to, and how we'll reach them depends on how much money we bring in this month -- and without reaching our goal, I'm afraid we won't be able to spread Paul's message to the furthest corners of this district.

**[Help us out before the end of the month -- chip in whatever you can now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8rq8srS5Oz8VR_rf41upsYHerjrhM7vBIXuf5249Nw=/ERkeQsLtRpqN0G-bm2T-vDRpG9rBSVf2vNw_S3YS3jU=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Kerry Gooch
Campaign Manager

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8rq8srS5Oz8VR_rf41upsYHerjrhM7vBIXuf5249Nw=/ERkeQsLtRpqN0G-bm2T-vDRpG9rBSVf2vNw_S3YS3jU=?gpsid=8_36_2299&refcode=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM1_fnd_gq_ful__KG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)

Team -
After a recent poll came out showing us neck and neck with Donald Trump's rubber stamp Dean Heller, _The Washington Post_ reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" in the Senate. It's clear that we have _zero_ path to the Senate majority if we lose here in November.
**That 's why I couldn't be more thrilled that a group of donors just offered to match every gift until our critical end-of-month deadline to help us flip this state _and_ the Senate blue - and protect the future of the Supreme Court.** You've already heard from Elizabeth Warren, Jason Kander, and Harry Reid. They're all in. Want to join them to help make history and fight back against Donald Trump? **[Just click here to give $5 and have it matched!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd18a/4fbb2af3/7ab388c2/5e8b73c5/4129721309/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgyNS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk825-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_POLITICO_ reported that our race could be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country - with a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC spending $11.2 million in Nevada.
Team, we just can't win this November or regain Senate control unless we take advantage of opportunities like this match. **And with just days to go, we 're still way short of our end-of-month goal. If we're going to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate, I'm counting on top supporters like you to give now and get your gift doubled:**

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Announcement: Please read Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hello Friend, I have a huge announcement. This is the very last end-of-month online fundraising campaign before the August primary. Starting this morning, I am making a push to find 1,000 online donors and raise an extra $15,000 by July 31st. This is the biggest online fundraising goal of the campaign yet. But Jeff is telling that I must raise this money in order to fund our voter outreach efforts. So what do does this mean? It means I need your help, Friend. Friend, I am super excited about this goal. This is exactly the kind of boost the campaign needs to put us over the top for the primary in August. Your donation makes a direct impact on the outcome of the election. This is one of the most important moments of the campaign. This could be a razor thin election. In the last few election cycles, we have witnessed unbelievable victories from grassroots campaigns. Now it’s our turn. [**Friend, I am asking to you make a donation today. I need to find 1,000 online donors before the end of the month. It would mean the world to me if you donated. Please contribute by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D072618_fr%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=072618_fr&n=1) We can elect another Rand Paul to the Senate. We can defeat Josh Hawley. And once we defeat Josh Hawley? I will kick Claire McCaskill out of office. Our polling shows I beat her by 16 points! But I need your help, Friend. clean_body: | Hello Friend, I have a huge announcement. This is the very last end-of-month online fundraising campaign before the August primary. Starting this morning, I am making a push to find 1,000 online donors and raise an extra $15,000 by July 31st. This is the biggest online fundraising goal of the campaign yet. But Jeff is telling that I must raise this money in order to fund our voter outreach efforts. So what do does this mean? It means I need your help, Friend. Friend, I am super excited about this goal. This is exactly the kind of boost the campaign needs to put us over the top for the primary in August. Your donation makes a direct impact on the outcome of the election. This is one of the most important moments of the campaign. This could be a razor thin election. In the last few election cycles, we have witnessed unbelievable victories from grassroots campaigns. Now it’s our turn. We can elect another Rand Paul to the Senate. We can defeat Josh Hawley. And once we defeat Josh Hawley? I will kick Claire McCaskill out of office. Our polling shows I beat her by 16 points! But I need your help, Friend. Thank you so much. Please make sure you donate right away! There’s isn’t much time left. Austin Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate ()

| | It's July 26th. Just five days from our July deadline. And we are not on track to reach that target. Peter, we already missed our last fundraising goal. With Sherrod's opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, closing in on the polls, and one Koch group attacking Sherrod, we cannot miss another. name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: “Showing Up” (Watch Beto’s first campaign ad)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

We just launched our first ad! And like our grassroots campaign across
Texas, it’s historic: the first Senate ad ever created entirely from live
stream footage.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180726&amount=3&t=1001&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl ]Check out Beto’s brand-new ad below. Then, donate
$3
to help us make sure everyone across the state sees it before our critical
end-of-month deadline.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180726&amount=3&t=1002&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl ]Beto for Texas

Our new ad, called “Showing Up,” was shot on the iPhone that has captured
hundreds of public events we’ve held over the past 16 months -- including
town halls, rallies, roundtable discussions and runs with Beto.

For those of you who haven’t been able to join us in person, Beto had the
idea to live stream as much of our campaign as possible -- inviting Texans
everywhere to join him in the car and follow along as he shows up to
listen and learn from those he wants to represent.

And that’s how Beto’s been running this campaign. He’s traveled to all 254
counties in Texas. He’s refused to write anyone off or take anyone for
granted. He’s outright rejected contributions from PACs, instead relying
100% on people.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180726&amount=3&t=1003&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl ]Hundreds of live stream videos later, we’ve got our first campaign ad
-- shot entirely on an iPhone. Can you donate
$3
to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can keep Beto’s
brand-new ad in front of Texans?

Thanks for tuning in.

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180726&amount=3&t=1004&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl ]Contribute
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180726footer&t=1005&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=1381%2E444211%2ECL4gZl

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Stop subsidizing fossil fuels
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Our future, our children's future, and our planet's future all depend on us taking action against climate change.
#
Friend,
Our future, our children's future, and our planet's future all depend on us taking action against climate change. Scientists have been warning us for years about the dangers of a warming planet and have been telling us what steps we need to be taking to curb global warming.
One of the major issues that we are faced with today is not what to do, but how to change the policies that are holding us back.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa2a/bed43eb/7f592421/75fd5841/1652948940/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-private-sector-and-climate-change-holding-corporations-accountable")
**[In this video, Bill McKibben addresses some of the ways that we can hold corporations accountable and stop actions that negatively affect the environment: we must get money out of politics, encourage taxes that reflect the true cost of pollution, and put an end to subsidies for companies that harm the environment.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa2a/bed43eb/7f592421/75fd5841/1652948940/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-private-sector-and-climate-change-holding-corporations-accountable")**
Our future depends on it.
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa2a/bed43eb/7f592421/75fd5840/1652948940/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180726")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa2a/bed43eb/7f592421/75fd5843/1652948940/VEsC/ "https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20and=20Chanel?=
subject: Life is Not Complicated...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=d1d492272b&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **Peter,**

**Life is not complicated when it comes to the innocent and the unborn.**

You are either FOR the Constitutional right to LIFE, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness or you are against it. God has His hand on every life, but the responsibility is ours, (through the 10th Amendment) in each of our communities, to protect and to enforce the Founders' intent to protect ALL life under the Constitution.

_The selfish few on the left who want to commit murder under the guise of "abortion" and "choice" will have their Judgement Day;_ their moral compass is theirs to tend. **But we would be as guilty as they if we did not fight everyday to protect the unborn and the innocent and to fight to change the left's "pro-choice" ways.**

Should I become your U.S. Senator, _**I will parse no effort, I will parse no words in fighting and destroying Planned Parenthood and NARAL**_ \-- these organizations are blood-thirsty agents of evil. This is war. They must be stopped. But only if we fight together.

[Help us make that difference.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=b50ec568ad&e=9da9b0ca31)

Courtland and Chanel

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Peter, Life is not complicated when it comes to the innocent and the unborn. You are either FOR the Constitutional right to LIFE, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness or you are against it. God has His hand on every life, but the responsibility is ours, (through the 10th Amendment) in each of our communities, to protect and to enforce the Founders' intent to protect ALL life under the Constitution. The selfish few on the left who want to commit murder under the guise of "abortion" and "choice" will have their Judgement Day; their moral compass is theirs to tend. But we would be as guilty as they if we did not fight everyday to protect the unborn and the innocent and to fight to change the left's "pro-choice" ways. Should I become your U.S. Senator, I will parse no effort, I will parse no words in fighting and destroying Planned Parenthood and NARAL \-- these organizations are blood-thirsty agents of evil. This is war. They must be stopped. But only if we fight together. Courtland and Chanel | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about: God and Family First Pro-Strong Military Pro-Wall Pro-Gun Pro-Law Enforcement Pro-Lower Taxes Pro-Energy Pro-School Choice Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda Oppose-Globalism Oppose-Green Lunacy #1 Constitutional Conservative America Number One MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE Courtland Sykes for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: taking a break
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you. You’ve been with me all the way,

Friend,

I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you.

You’ve been with me all the way, friend, and your support has made all the difference in this race. But we’ve reached a very critical point.

This upcoming debate will show all of Wisconsin who is the strongest candidate to take on Tammy Baldwin. So [**I need to know: Do I still have your support?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre5qMM1R3xXoHAuu-oGbn-d4ctj_OaYIFyFR7RNCq-dGpBA_ut1HPuj3imlop5goyHhndsqMcaOqaThtW8NP8haGRSAJzq25kDwI2ib3rn7_8ekTK8N1kxFAqN4u4ACGOpaHjDz-GbOAdThpC73HdfYcb0OtCBblopr-0wPDvWLZQUPQjC-bhJvhL0uAaa70EfFVMDtCGY_D_P0qnd7EOaj8p70LELbypLS3jnaGIciiKRDN5lFL48783yCnbiPDUt7L6caNnonNAQKXADHu8u5EZzsjTWIL5HcUcPp3gcxhz9oERcIMInLaarkY71aefPGDTDsordEbdCJE6uJoNGOC-nqinV1mfdaZ7DsWoBO60ufDcc2qXNKdEXCXUXzqYsU-zDBmFsWHLqp2d7nXb7ts%3D)

[SHOW THAT YOU'RE WITH ME](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre5qMM1R3xXoHAuu-oGbn-d4ctj_OaYIFyFR7RNCq-dGpBA_ut1HPuj3imlop5goyHhndsqMcaOqaThtW8NP8haGRSAJzq25kDwI2ib3rn7_8ekTK8N1kxFAqN4u4ACGOpaHjDz-GbOAdThpC73HdfYcb0OtCBblopr-0wPDvWLZQ1ri2uEiV1QEGuheca55V1fv2jhFVxKkRc6kcODDOPpgYnNQ7vu6pL2BLtM2rktAavRNw7qm9Xqi_XA-6uBm-0SRELfTAuPlOIotCv-pbpC_BU6tXiTwKoLl2P42RAilk1RKNAB6v0wTfsoYi1XKUsR9sx3NqfX-hwKFfeDIxU2k2Qaida64zM3jJ6akyETJKv3O0YqayRGhCSoO2FwcLNu_ngWl8LrYnORjauU0ZGl0%3D)
---

Friend, another term for Tammy Baldwin in the Senate would be a nightmare not only for our state, but our country. She’s owned by the liberal elite, peddling their dangerous agenda, and I know I am the best person to stop her.

[CHIP IN: STOP TAMMY BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre5qMM1R3xXoHAuu-oGbn-d4ctj_OaYIFyFR7RNCq-dGpBA_ut1HPuj3imlop5goyHhndsqMcaOqaThtW8NP8haGRSAJzq25kDwI2ib3rn7_8ekTK8N1kxFAqN4u4ACGOpaHjDz-GbOAdThpC73HdfYcb0OtCBblopr-0wPDvWLZQNkgLThlo3M66QmRcEt-d3_7wlKjwtI6yrbD2SuCNW0GZOeB3B9N5DBpOb0OV5fT1zb9nbuKMKHy0Pv2KIuj_R39bNQz6bqo7rGj5g7LHfUZ_g9QCNUoIjWbZ3LkLQKq2-cidQ1XWRHE7giUhLIJxR-N9937MRY6yQQ1A1JDVeilqw6c9RthnLRgYWygRyFooveMctSls-rq3LuIAcc0nEnOLNT1lIB2tXNCWyVf21ow%3D)
---

When I take the stage, I’ll be picturing the terrible future we would have if Tammy Baldwin continues to represent us in the U.S. Senate. I’ll think of the countless Wisconsin families depending on a real fighter in the Senate – and I’ll share my plan for a great America.

But first, [**I need to hear from you.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre5qMM1R3xXoHAuu-oGbn-d4ctj_OaYIFyFR7RNCq-dGpBA_ut1HPuj3imlop5goyHhndsqMcaOqaThtW8NP8haGRSAJzq25kDwI2ib3rn7_8ekTK8N1kxFAqN4u4ACGOpaHjDz-GbOAdThpC73HdfYcb0OtCBblopr-0wPDvWLZQfAUZBdZph2OW8kgPC1DmHgrOF0m9BzVAyG7MRvhAHd7HLzpSK589aQMNeGKYixsE9TsR31EtvWyqYEhtarO7gycRt3tnrvnDPTe9tast9UgwkEk4Bg1xCnBvFwiKlcNkqkBNU4YKUzWUcLEZSxDKQpbJrl3pJgeKowxd2hEAG-pvMJncHrZKDofakN7GFks-o3MK_zmhPTFNHaFkEinnQR_Vvbr5W-XCOH6qADerQVQ%3D) I need to know that you’re with me. Then, we can win this fight and beat Tammy.

Thanks,

Leah

P.S. I hope you’ll watch tonight’s debate. Find out how **[here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre2reNDawFxpDMIGoj8vrjV7su0cHV8Z_97NeeWCTrUO_CRRy4dYKVutxt_nDf-SLecq5PrDL8XvfbC-Ib2Ny7d-iuAE5t4hxpNM0A91YZA99FyiIFfO5x6PbN0joC1Y7M3UJRfT1PBbko0ChKqhHx8ye3avkfEei0irzCh2crAU5bmdrwpblj25DdI7TwPmevBJHZ0WYE0BWpuLpb_ITAuZ-O_L97vGs2LNrg9a1syNurRNB-oBa0XzEQpZTnXI6OUxS8ZBzYDfRvSkDsX2SqWiofemtgyJzM5OrpRV3bHiXJKypH_OjvZY_iVNOSeQNB429oTIALpDmJb-XZl_6i363saPd4zI9wR2xh_kENu_oJXlozJ5evZ-z_6m3vr-bQA%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre47DxhTpmlYffBRMK-U7n_fq9jECegl-qA_NO4evR3QUajmXqfXrvIYMdfADdHwZSEsPk9qVa4MsaNGwHmlLadN47wl34SQcAcsO02T78HQ0KFH5gRqVUqhoUyAMuSjfjYB4NwiKVabRAjEdD-If4vHsezxx0Skje-1MTbAaiT_wBPsuU5On8rVohI97632x4bVmnGR2W0KRs_hKTGmT1lyxIiI8K-Ko98Fu_5S-Yg1FpmzznQhWNOroiBqUk0HVMQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=fe819718fc294abdbab2b478b167c83d&_e=yaygr6N3hhuCuk86wdJre1-akvd_92ww-kGlwRTzDENuIF_vfDUg2hw8jPdjJP_7F6M9JjwCVheGOk9jn3c9XFnjoK2WHXowQTmkrlyUt-eCAj1JjZzm6_30Uw5gvv03LGFJn7vq64Zogj58OAQLGe9zrGwUtqtphOw-FgdfxTnQ_fCxPEWH7KzLwxFvS3MvzS5og6vI_XCSOX7-Yveg8JveX4IRpO4dTqA1DyDOkNkhtrTMKd5HaPvynlEfuaOUERwKWKUa0sbj6ZtvQiAx7w%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you. You’ve been with me all the way, Friend, I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you. You’ve been with me all the way, friend, and your support has made all the difference in this race. But we’ve reached a very critical point. This upcoming debate will show all of Wisconsin who is the strongest candidate to take on Tammy Baldwin. So Friend, another term for Tammy Baldwin in the Senate would be a nightmare not only for our state, but our country. She’s owned by the liberal elite, peddling their dangerous agenda, and I know I am the best person to stop her. When I take the stage, I’ll be picturing the terrible future we would have if Tammy Baldwin continues to represent us in the U.S. Senate. I’ll think of the countless Wisconsin families depending on a real fighter in the Senate – and I’ll share my plan for a great America. But first, I need to know that you’re with me. Then, we can win this fight and beat Tammy. Thanks, Leah P.S. I hope you’ll watch tonight’s debate. Find out how . Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Frances Wolf
subject: "Whatever happens" isn't good enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hello,

A true leader doesn't just let "whatever" happen.

When Republicans tried to criminalize abortion and defund Planned Parenthood, Tom didn't just let it happen -- he stood with women and vetoed Republicans' extreme plan to force survivors of rape and incest to carry their pregnancies to term.

But when Scott Wagner was asked what he'd do if the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , he told a reporter "whatever happens, happens."

That's not leadership. And Pennsylvania deserves better. Tom has stood up for women's rights as long as I've known him -- from our days volunteering at Planned Parenthood, to vetoing the most anti-choice bill in the country. And when Republicans announced their new plan to ban abortion at just 6 weeks, before most women know they are pregnant, he immediately said he would veto their bill.

_Because he's not willing to let "whatever" happen to Pennsylvanians._

When our schools are under attack, Tom fights for them. When Washington politicians try to take away our healthcare, Tom fights back. And when powerful interests and foreign parties try to rig our elections, Tom defends our democracy.

We can count on Tom to always fight for all of us. But we need to make sure Tom has the resources to beat Scott Wagner in November so he can continue defending the rights of women and every Pennsylvanian as our governor.

**So please, chip in $5 or $10 now to help Tom fight for every Pennsylvanian:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/whatever-happens](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec38b/73a2bc12/39854fa9/1fce3bf1/2307895774/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wagner-women-graphic?gpsid=8_50_2308&refcode=em18_180726_aborti_fnd_gq_ful__FW_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_aborti_fnd_gq_ful__FW_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=13+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomwhateverhappens")**

Thank you,

Frances Wolf

I won't sugarcoat it, team:

We're not on track to meet our $15,000 match goal before the deadline on Saturday, and the consequences could be devastating.

Ever since Bob called out the president's corrupt bargain with corporate special interests over this Supreme Court nomination, they've really stepped up their attacks. The Koch brothers are running ads in Pennsylvania, and just this week VP Pence came to the Commonwealth and attacked Bob for refusing to support the most dangerous and divisive pieces of the administration's agenda.

With attacks coming from the very top of the Republican establishment, this campaign needs to be prepared to fight back. But budgets are tight, and right now our advertising is on the chopping block. **That 's why this match opportunity is so important: it's a chance for grassroots supporters to come together to make a game-changing investment to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat.**

We don't have much time before the match expires and there is another $8,480 worth of match dollars to unlock. **_[Can you give $5 to support Bob right now? "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thanks, Cate Cate Domino Digital Director Bob Casey for Senate | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: The single issue that should unite us
body:
Peter,
I believe this will be one of the most defining years in the history of the Church.
There are moments in history when the church stood united against the strong current of anti-Christian cultures.
But there are also times when the church caved when it failed to be salt and light and instead was silent and indistinguishable from the secular culture.
**Today, the voter base of the left is galvanized around one singular issue: abortion.**
Of course, they want to reframe the issue by calling it “women’s rights” or “reproductive rights.”
A recent NBC survey suggests their messaging is working: seventy-one percent of American voters are supportive of Roe v. Wade and do not believe the ruling should be overturned.
So, we shouldn’t be surprised to encounter strong opposition to our beliefs. When people of faith stand for life – when we stand in unity on the belief that God is the creator and granter of human life – we are going up against a powerful, progressive force and the majority of cultural opinion.
If President Trump’s Supreme Court nominee, Judge Kavanaugh, is confirmed, for the first time in decades, it is possible that Roe v. Wade could be rolled back and the issue of abortion given back to the states.
**This means not only elections for representatives on Capitol Hill are important, but state elections for representatives, senators, judges, and governors will be vital.**
States are already preparing for the possibility of a new Supreme Court ruling on life. In Alabama, a measure on the ballot could amend the Alabama Constitution to recognize the sanctity of unborn life. Mississippi recently passed one of the strongest anti-abortion laws in the country, banning abortions 15 weeks after gestation.
On the other side, however, pro-abortion advocates are also hard at work to prepare for a potential change to Roe v. Wade.
Massachusetts lawmakers are waiting on the governor to sign a passed bill which repeals a pro-life 173-year-old law against “procuring a miscarriage.”
Why would Massachusetts pass a pro-abortion law if abortion is already legal? Because they are terrified that the “right” to an abortion, as they know it, could come to an end VERY soon.
**If there is any chance of changing Roe v. Wade and eradicating abortion at all levels, it will be because people of faith united and stood boldly at the voting booth.**
An estimated 51 million Christians in America DO NOT plan to vote this election. We cannot stand by and allow this incredible opportunity to defend the sanctity of life to pass us by.
Peter, this is a historic moment for the Church in America.
There are 90-million Christians in the states. We have the influence to impact elections from the local level all the way to the state and national level, if we understand this cultural moment we are living in and VOTE.
**If the church doesn’t show up to the polls united for life who will?**
I need your help to inspire and motivate Jesus followers to vote in November. This cannot just be my mission. I’m asking you to join me in your prayers and financial support.
[Please make your best financial gift to My Faith Votes today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e1807206apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=1)!
My Faith Votes has a two-pronged strategy to mobilize 90 million Christians this year.
First, we must wake up churches to this cultural moment. We have a plan to reach 20,000+ churches with our _United. We Stand._ voter mobilization toolkit, a comprehensive set of resources to empower and mobilize congregations to bring their faith to the voting booth!
We provide guidance to pastors and church leadership boards with everything they need from voting technology, biblical voter guides, and legal guidance for pastors.
Second, we are launching a massive and aggressive media campaign on social networks, TV, and radio to inform millions of Christians of the importance of their vote this year!
This is going to require significant financial resources. We cannot execute on this plan without your support.
[I’m asking you to prayerfully consider making a financial contribution of any amount today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e1807206apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=2).
I can’t think of any better investment than fighting for the most innocent in our society.
I don’t want us to look back and wish we, as people of faith, had done more to seize this historic opportunity to lead with Biblical principles and protect the sanctity of life.
[Please make your best gift to My Faith Votes today to see people of faith stand united for Life at the polls](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e1807206apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=3)!
[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/e1807206apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=4)
**United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=5)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180726apl01nd&n=6).

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: This could force Donald Trump to divest from his businesses.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We can take on the beating heart of Trump's corruption -- The Trump Organization.
#

Peter -
There was a watershed moment in the emoluments lawsuit against Donald Trump yesterday. A federal judge ruled that the case may proceed despite the president's objections.
The potential implications of this case are unprecedented. This could force Trump to shut down his hotel in DC, divest from his businesses and even pull the Trump Organization's books into the public record.
I was part of the team that created the legal strategy in the original emoluments lawsuit against Donald Trump -- three days into his presidency. I also pushed the former New York Attorney General to join this case with the Maryland and DC AGs. He failed to act.
But if I am your next Attorney General, New York will join this fight. Maryland and DC can only go after the businesses in their jurisdictions, but if New York joins this suit, **we can take on the beating heart of Trump 's corruption -- The Trump Organization.**
The next New York Attorney General must be a check on the president's corruption and lawlessness. I will do just that, but I need your help to do it:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? There are powerful people and wealthy interests likely to spend whatever it takes to stop us because they're afraid of an independent AG. With your help, we can beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e9e/6e822e2f/1a7c78e5/417248fe/2601764469/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjYtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180726-a")**
This type of litigation is exactly what you can count on in an Attorney General Teachout administration. I have spent the better part of my adult life studying and writing about corruption, and yes, the emoluments clause.
In the opinion, the judge cited my research four times. Most notably by adopting that there is an anti-corruption principle embedded in the Constitution: Corruption does not include only blatant bribes.
Peter, I have been arguing this principle for nine years. It is clear that, in this moment in our history, it has never been more important to have an independent Attorney General who will focus on rooting out corruption wherever it may exist -- from Albany to Wall Street to the presidency.
I am ready to lead that fight, but I cannot do it alone.
**[Your $3 donation matters because it is people like you who power our campaign-- not corporations or big monied interests. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e9e/6e822e2f/1a7c78e5/417248fe/2601764469/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjYtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180726-a")**
The only way we will get justice for working people is if we're in this together, so thank you for your support.
Best,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e9e/6e822e2f/1a7c78e5/417248fe/2601764469/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjYtYSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180726-a")**

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e9e/6e822e2f/1a7c78e5/417248e0/2601764469/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: Claire McCaskill
subject: buyers remorse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Friend, for the past 30 years, I've asked women I meet to take the price of that bad blouse in the closet and write a check to a candidate they believe in.
You know that blouse. You didn't have time to try it on, but you liked the color, and it was _such_ a bargain. You bought it, brought it home ... but when you put it on, something wasn't quite right. And of course, it still hangs in the back of your closet.
To this day, I still get checks from folks who write "blouse" in the memo line - who are taking the dollars they would've spent on that next bad blouse and using that money to elect a senator who will pour her heart into fighting for the issues that matter most to them.
**Friend, today, I 'm asking you to close your eyes and imagine your own closet. How much did that just-too-orange sweater or what-was-I-thinking pair of shoes cost?**
**[Can you make a donation of that amount to support my campaign today? I promise your donation will go toward keeping me fighting for women's access to affordable healthcare and equal pay.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1383-D-fr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
I'm in the toughest race of my career - so every dollar truly makes a difference. Here's the link once more: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1383-D-fr&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
I'm so grateful for your support.
- C
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the McCaskill for Missouri email list, please click here.](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6jRSW%2BTbfPe2rYsx0AGVU97p5OKW6SAC&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.clairemccaskill.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D10%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
Contributions or gifts to McCaskill for Missouri are not tax deductible.

If you'd prefer to donate by check, you can use [this form.](http://wfc2.wiredforchange.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6wmjJpmqdsembVDV%2BMOmy97p5OKW6SAC&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwfc2.wiredforchange.com%2Fo%2F8%2Fimages%2FMcCaskill_MailDonationforDigital-2018.pdf)

We have an aggressive GOTV plan we will be implementing and we are hitting the radio and TV stations soon. Can you please help us out one more time with a contribution? Our campaign is dependent on grassroots support and you have helped the campaign out greatly up to this point. Thank you. _We would not be in the position we are in without you._ We just need to get to the finish line strong. name: News Questionnaire - Team Kaine
subject: Stressed about the news? Tell us about it (seriously, fill this out →)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1222/3e0906/6e9d0581/3e35d573/892263266/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll&source=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll")

| | Derek, it's been quite a hectic (and honestly, difficult) last few weeks.

Tim has been wearing a lot of hats: Debating with opponent Corey Stewart to a packed audience, campaigning with our House candidates across the Commonwealth, and going to hearings, votes and committee meetings day in and day out in the Senate.

There's a lot to do when you're fighting for the issues that are at the moral core of who we are as Virginians.

[Will you answer some quick poll questions on some of the issues that have been in the news lately? Hearing from you lets us know how things really are on the ground, and how Tim can best represent you.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1222/3e0906/6e9d0581/3e35d572/892263266/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+answer+some+quick+poll+question&utm_campaign=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll")

**We 'll get these answers to Tim [tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1222/3e0906/6e9d0581/3e35d571/892263266/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll") \- he always looks forward to hearing about the things you bring to our team's attention.**

We know it's hard - okay, exhausting - to keep up with the news cycle, but we appreciate how vigilant you stay. So please, keep paying attention, keep forming opinions, and keep speaking out to let others know what you believe.

Because we're listening.

_Team Kaine_ | [**START BRIEF QUESTIONNAIRE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1222/3e0906/6e9d0581/3e35d570/892263266/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/july-questionnaire?source=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+START+BRIEF+QUESTIONNAIRE&utm_campaign=20180726_1_POLL_TEAM_Issues-poll")

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Coverage for pre-existing conditions in jeopardy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

The Administration recently told a federal court in Texas that it would not defend a crucial piece of the Affordable Care Act -- putting health coverage for Americans with pre-existing conditions at risk.

If their argument is accepted by the federal courts it could lead to insurers being able to deny coverage to those with pre-existing conditions again.

This is wrong, and I'm fighting it.

Millions of Americans rely on these protections for their health care, and we can't put their access to coverage in jeopardy.

**We beat the Administration 's attempts to gut the Affordable Care Act before, and now we need to do it again. **[**Will you add your name to support protecting coverage for people with pre-existing conditions?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Hcj72P8MZeZGaBH%2FOVJVXV%2BRsroIeHCq)

Thanks,

Amy

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=rK6%2B%2BlFLHJ7%2Fy2zQbGnIA1%2BRsroIeHCq)**

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: [Endorsement Update] 53 red-to-blue House, Senate, and governors' seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4dc3/24c69fd9/275ea8b89/188588ac/1912864095/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES64N_digital_email_20180726_EndoUpdate_inact&source=WQEFES64N_digital_email_20180726_EndoUpdate_inact")
---

Peter,

Here's a quick endorsement update: We've endorsed enough women to flip the House and Senate with just pro-choice Democratic women and we've endorsed enough candidates to more than quintuple the number of Democratic women governors.
* HOUSE: We need **23** seats to flip the House. We've endorsed **43** women to turn red seats blue and **14** women who must hold blue seats.

* SENATE: We need just **two** seats to flip the Senate. We've endorsed **two** women to do it -- Jacky Rosen (NV) and Kyrsten Sinema (AZ) -- and **10** women who are up for re-election.

* GOVERNOR: We've endorsed **eight** women to flip governors' seats from red to blue and **three** women to hold blue seats.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women flip the House and Senate and win a record number of governors' seats:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Support-These-Endorsements](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4dc3/24c69fd9/275ea8b89/188588ad/1912864095/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180726_email_EndorsementUpdate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSupportTheseEndo&utm_campaign=WQEFES64N_digital_email_20180726_EndoUpdate_inact&source=WQEFES64N_digital_email_20180726_EndoUpdate_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

clean_body: Derek, You're invited to Exeter for the Grand Opening of Governor Sununu's Campaign Office at 9:30am THIS Saturday, July 28th! There will be coffee and light breakfast in the morning with our field team followed by an opportunity to learn about how you can get involved to elect Republicans in 2018! We need your help to ensure Republican victory in 2018! Can't make it on Saturday? Join us for to learn more how you can get involved. Onward to victory, Ashley WalukevichRNC State Director New Hampshire | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Geoff Burgan, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: We're on TV
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d5/9e00690/59e1e9e0/2402febb/3321185968/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&source=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx")
Friends,

This race is coming down to the wire, and thanks to donors like you, we were able to get our very first TV ad on the air. **This is a big moment in this race -- and it 's Mayor Gillum's birthday today!**

With volunteers hitting the streets to lay the groundwork for this election and a new TV ad laying out Mayor Gillum's progressive plans, his fearless track record and inspiring personal story, we're on track to win the August 28 primary -- and then flip Florida blue in November.

But it's going to take a lot of resources to keep the ad on the air and I can't stress how important it is that we're able to reach as many voters as possible. **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help spread Mayor Gillum's story?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d5/9e00690/59e1e9e0/2402feba/3321185968/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-tv-ad-email?gpsid=13_55_2321&refcode=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in++ask++or+whatever+you+c")**

There's no doubt in my mind that Mayor Gillum is ready to not only compete in counties across Florida, but win them -- in both the primary and the general election.

But that's only going to happen if we spread his story to every corner of the state.

**[So please, chip in $5 now and help us stay on the air.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d5/9e00690/59e1e9e0/2402febd/3321185968/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-tv-ad-email?gpsid=13_55_2321&refcode=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=3+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++now+and+help+us+")**

Thank you,

Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37d5/9e00690/59e1e9e0/2402febc/3321185968/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-tv-ad-email?gpsid=13_55_2321&refcode=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_TVAD2_fnd_gq_act__GB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

Andrew Gillum for Governor
1550 Melvin Street,
Tallahassee, FL 32303

name: Team Morse
subject: A clear choice in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
Jessica Morse:

- Served our country honorably as a public servant at home & in Iraq
- Will fight for accessible, affordable health care for all, including the most vulnerable
- Committed to protecting the Social Security funds our seniors worked their whole lives for
- Will protect our children from gun violence
- Committed to expanding vocational training programs and ensuring children can afford higher education
- Will fight for proactive fire prevention—which saves homes, businesses & taxpayer money
- Fifth-generation Northern Californian & resident of our district

Tom McClintock:

- Collected over $3 million from taxpayers as a 35-year career politician
- Voted to strip health care from 300,000 of his own constituents with pre-existing conditions
- Supports raising the retirement age & gutting Social Security & Medicare
- Wants to arm teachers in our schools
- Advocates for ending ALL financial aid, which will harm our students & our local economies
- Jeopardizes our safety by refusing to fund fire prevention & help our neighbors rebuild
- Spent the majority of his life in NY & SoCal—has never lived in our district

California's 4th District has a clear choice in November: Jessica Morse

CHIP IN NOW >> http://bit.ly/2JUXgz4

------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. |
------------------------------------------------------------------------

Jessica Morse for Congress
1079 Sunrise Ave
Ste B 275
Roseville CA 95611 United States

Check out the details below and RSVP.

-Leah

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=6n18wAdiauMuAywtIMg_43-jOgoXWCbyPevHAZXuQZD6hbwzerohKUlXUtmuJ5hDwmqlHModCmAAfJEVHdZIEz7f7Yzw8Mdj_2wni5Gi92_NMYlpI8aI7ZZ1b0tZOZYxaRQUM-W4oNMhHi8iQowSVpXKsuvuJwWIfRgOlge_JC1UHPd_wRsw0ilcGtMZie7Z7C0muJWApbibu_8B3Mfrp0COV-0bEhUbCihZb1ZpyHafd2NpGCp8A0Kv12w4NF9r). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDH9IUqsXFr5k2_SAagi0pI1pOwMy2sucEhxANHtYxZxplq-YBHcjsgKO2-UNBMWHW9sTEN_8SefnvUtrc-SeGfOMhXQlLyBf0iZs6CAh3CkfrjZZJic3w4CvH2recQz5ZdEpl3eg2qHquZ50O1K51kidU5RE0Qd7nglkPFC7vdj-dL8e2je8bbMx7bcE2TivbaM0DKboXbUpLZ8f5yb6MlcE1iHrqHXpUaYRNHQRZ89aESjzTnM-mcMzlUSN1Wka1q4SstUeeGD6_e-Z3zVfEL-z-RQzLFcj655c9ksrkDZzOz4LF-r3vWVkZIpDB_kcu4dfA2cOgw_G-KWYLYeoAmSv3_gPerD6R_A0WejHRU8t) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDH9IUqsXFr5k2_SAagi0pI2KyB8EWBotmqxRYfx6AccRXzSmDUC_ZW-kOlE-bq2PvzQmlLHXrEiJWVhK5h-zHaE9Ouu7rAhHfDN-uq25pIpwfiC5JzViUnop2jG6UuOQHo_3Col7NIHjmjaSqrpEuYm95WnOKiDWVrMrXUtfmzNRoRA-1a-yCIAPT3GbGE7SH4ZLDVyj-nQW4bf1i4pssnjW70yMgr3NyCbT5kh8Qkbpw3z6u8dyh7KJ4MPH9kaGARJEqdkp0bPvKvCU6tpeKJZPQbyPo1CUetDo0XOC21mc_nh9lxvkrnnpH_2wkK-EdTSXAlV_oUGubZZXdgCh_hbDOZ9LWP9O29jyk5mzAUom) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDO0hyd90cDYBvlBSKU4UFB31y9x9p_aY5kKGFzwcdktdgaIAGhbhnzzybtman26N2wQUY8kXTMPePX4wWkte8b1DCwXNZZBXU0lKQ5uld9QUvFjHc5NHdQmr1aXvLv8mD8wRhbkzdRb-7TfZbkIKJ518oSFN_Lfu8B8pb_bJ4GVHWA4O5Aj2VYugpce3X06COhh6M818_-A-NFaMw5dsdtw7auDRe1nj2meZjqiJYzIEx-TS04oTVAQxIy-fMOx70g%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDJVcVokmMAe_x00VOLN4_TxZAB5KaoQPoJ-1U0Q0BiNpRDn31UN152dSnmZcAPXHZVGZX3BlZ0v5Ne4rQBNTcdN0fjJKo_FFzD-9ZHywWFtUBcr6lDz53VD-9cYlyj7mmMC6W8qdP4JlyE_jCbHxcO62hYUhw4bYzknBiTotVhvVeDkCrjH_Tkc0Q9muFyw-RxxFNGRpzmMzCG73o5UNo9cU45lPee9Cw8MtcymVBMiuLclmuDv9RdbWKP_zqOvjdg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDOAxUJBPy5x5H7rSezbwoqztyplQ5y4KR-PxyzIfo0pHFKqqmlUVh3OD-CpF3VgyCmUagk02K5aVsMvQg3AkMh2MkcIYeSVgAletNonbcnk2QlUKMGgFrqSMTx4p_--6IfgK8BdEi-82kbHn-JkbrLjz_Ec2IZzurggfqJKEf0swcT5mqP0sWOj4VTkwcKfO6WjK2sF44Gs2cOV_s5GZXDgUH-ed7dfl4WRLlIhngkr8OfWIZ2qJRABX2_Klh1ES6A%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=fKjtzza3bxS7W499UzZTDH9IUqsXFr5k2_SAagi0pI2-Qm1GWscXx6ObqVFMOmxRSbBJ8iVAiXxHA9JKjtD3EDW4wjwW8cTcY0FTbBwN752nxKkKqlOawMvEkn4KfdhsppWbSeerp17vat4qjJ_5Saw9jrQJ35xqwUX07YSpBsDzDxy1SIOycFaoCVwOBf4kMzBiIQohwZnP08Jam8QZlJcQMuRDqYnW_1AZFhEevPw2MAx0JNU01dwu32IQaXVabjM5zv7d3h62vA7zTK_V_pvUms5-ZYCE_jOLdd5AwutAIif4MeJ1ZvtFu23ymT9HV6USHo6OspbLvFa2_ySU-M0F8sdp9MBPnXbDw93pYu9VhZwInJB_3_XFsROyFoNF5u6WIzH7lAHSOCrlpYVD9Q%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=6n18wAdiauMuAywtIMg_43-jOgoXWCbyPevHAZXuQZD6hbwzerohKUlXUtmuJ5hDwmqlHModCmAAfJEVHdZIEz7f7Yzw8Mdj_2wni5Gi92_NMYlpI8aI7ZZ1b0tZOZYxaRQUM-W4oNMhHi8iQowSVpXKsuvuJwWIfRgOlge_JC1UHPd_wRsw0ilcGtMZie7Z7C0muJWApbibu_8B3Mfrp0COV-0bEhUbCihZb1ZpyHafd2NpGCp8A0Kv12w4NF9r) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=9f62947a0d184722b07506719b62f7ba&_e=6n18wAdiauMuAywtIMg_43-jOgoXWCbyPevHAZXuQZD6hbwzerohKUlXUtmuJ5hDwmqlHModCmAAfJEVHdZIEz7f7Yzw8Mdj_2wni5Gi92_NMYlpI8aI7ZZ1b0tZOZYxaRQUM-W4oNMhHi8iQowSVpXKsuvuJwWIfRgOlge_JC1UHPd_wRsw0ilcGtMZie7Z7C0muJWApbibu_8B3Mfrp0COV-0bEhUbCihZb1ZpyHafd2NpGCp8A0Kv12w4NF9r) to unsubscribe.
