Friend,

Tonight is the big night, and Leah is getting ready to take the stage. I wanted to make sure you saw her note during debate prep.

While we received a great show of support, I want to give Leah an extra boost before she takes the stage. [**And I need you to act NOW.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0YU5CdJHrGJkRiwcB0RvqG8s4kl6KOZuyRj5ZQEb6zt7v1Q5N9MBzBKy5_i6z9UD_sGl3w_YaPZH0v7EYkoewu-ooC-tv3G4xGCSVlIhTwdW2MBCb5gJLRBnj-5fsVejM9vKwpNZTWWW2-L6SOJXN-GpvFIGAoDOIvaCvtOSyqemI3BpUh3g1qPdP65hWavV4Mf5NjbLOeIJyH1u6DvJkz0xmzSOLCsmyMVdK9SrTb2o%3D)

My plan is to show her the list of supporters who respond to this email as we make our way from the debate prep room to the stage. **[I need to make sure your name is on it.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0tCEWygpPkrs3_1g3kAyykV9WET4IkPehJacfVRPXmMOVdf_EnZhKfPkWvpSLBdXuCxaJfZnoBTsSXee3gdAAHO72j7bWbjKyN6b4_pF2_f9CPzEdvcmzqku2QSppp7moovkyYi3XO7H-fdKJpVuR71_pG1ew8yuPeD7Uyut8P3_t7zZ32mx84NgF_c8HfFTepDYPl-YihVGFngfgrXyAoUum_7VECYFce4NxbHP57CU%3D)**

**[SHOW LEAH YOUR SUPPORT](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0dvXnvHNa1gE8Ohmo9TQ6FA3Zn1OnesFS1IubF7XOVWO9IdHYXQtpLjYblZNjDtQnPuwrqyDG-uh17_7lohkPgmxBZyKmhhCXuFU-04Ti33S_b40uRe5DSZgn4seiSp7HnbLJe0bEXDfsnVXSonpFIgj4bGyAHfAhTWJTB67aSLGBN2b1ijvl8J_CxT6GFb2f5WbzqLgWpu7yGWeHWVnU9SkxEHf3D2CCpZfpChXx-Ig%3D) **
---

Tonight is huge, friend. Leah will set herself apart as the only candidate capable of beating Senator Baldwin and saving our state from a SIX-YEAR TERM of far-left policies.

Showing Leah that you’re with her tonight could make all the difference.

Jess Ward
Campaign Manager
Leah for Senate

\-----Forwarded Message Below------

Friend,

I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you.

You’ve been with me all the way, friend, and your support has made all the difference in this race. But we’ve reached a very critical point.

This upcoming debate will show all of Wisconsin who is the strongest candidate to take on Tammy Baldwin. So [**I need to know: Do I still have your support?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0rb0oS_5P_W9AxmtBtrTz3w_NQIbGqrDu-Z3KQO1mUVVYFuMo5RwG8yAbiTHct9aLg4TtK4uD-Vkzye166k9XMnBKYaP3xupWYtGIpRTEte1XfQJzfJbel97RtxKyGDuETp8O-pXnbsVuF8uT2vPFmjmKrD8WSHRVsp-WABVp8KhgwvSBZ66ueJXm4tWnb6Mu5pI_9vuWAOE4G7to69mcX7CfHUWHZZrZUsyxDUjbnfg%3D)

[SHOW THAT YOU'RE WITH ME](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0tBZiyLYT6454-063UTlk-XsdM8jxgLfNC4jliV3x0rh3DPKYQzkGDzBd-Tc7YtWAdzD05rDMpUdWaO_Lsoa9cTUaG2kX9BAUKxu_cFRIX3fuJXoH5yzF8apsSdVHg6HrMlPM1TlbR8CuwSgMPwEB8Aob03lzj60l7L59dGMQV6LzvjXEz1KzTpPYFeoJ7YepaMA5MwzC3npxUg2fZ5WACYU_K2RkILqexrVwjJt887I%3D)
---

Friend, another term for Tammy Baldwin in the Senate would be a nightmare not only for our state, but our country. She’s owned by the liberal elite, peddling their dangerous agenda, and I know I am the best person to stop her.

[CHIP IN: STOP TAMMY BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0THKGJ52DwQ6I9FuGD5Ks4pwKZKKFN5GLL8YCsePMbpJu0DihgSxMyc2cYecxnt9EAUw_1URSOLZN5YNpZN2wIsMOnr1WXmSxAr7M824d0DuG5w8pBzOoo98RHwh5x-ROAoNi5saq9JLccByh4LxOGhkFsVMeAPMWwEJnjlm_39t85HiwpPb_4t6B0uXWRQrKMgiSLxhvvB2eTOOc4zENts6dqCI99hMzCcUhG7FpXcs%3D)
---

When I take the stage, I’ll be picturing the terrible future we would have if Tammy Baldwin continues to represent us in the U.S. Senate. I’ll think of the countless Wisconsin families depending on a real fighter in the Senate – and I’ll share my plan for a great America.

But first, [**I need to hear from you.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cCLBlDvk4E7IZMj_iTK8g1SumCNTddOK-zCsZBd-DS4tyiagzyxHoM0hKY3IjhuVxFfMk_SBOwwbWsPEQGwikfWUu3QnDpVvpcKMB7O2VQiOYBe196E3uKbG_GutqbKSkYRxdZ-AhlBtlCVjPfjPYBi_QsXXZHg6GEFn5ePdnG0nF_ugKC6BJ_Gn6b4IF-AIlgTeFPwIh11qHO8K3QuVOWEccVRgUVKv8iCSfuMGO_J63bCGF-sY-K6-0CXU-uW8WKRGqBv2SVEBROXE7Hc19MLoIVBzKbKnmSRdKYe5YzuR6pK-vwjhwWhTfdf11LDlHTvyNaWvWpYIW2S9bnpTgrIzxK3L5ZE72b21itqXM6tfKFjcVBLKDjudg1E-iq8Z6jfwOIaJHaZKzk-W-DZ4Tg%3D) I need to know that you’re with me. Then, we can win this fight and beat Tammy.

Thanks,

Leah

P.S. I hope you’ll watch tonight’s debate. Find out how **[here](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_XB6IQMrEHa-JxeR41PEHw7KDrZIAffi6qp6Yb7Icn0hgKkBtTq89s_6Gn18CchmfGsNhdPe69N307glJ_0tMu4MtoXOyHkL1vPgxc-Q-MK6zv8CeBR4hp0WLyQTBwY3GbXOUx4BVN6ISnS6Ktqd10muQHEFAgTszyQ8xqJ_9Jm1JOP4oUpa9mjnscTHsMFNPxfWfeZluACyRmqMmmm8L4HWPCiCT_e-nUlHYcj4omHQzVsUzflzn3y4nH2jItuA3RdWNf9IxkI9jcTHIu2-w4jndjXKTnc4mMhuDx-e2XaM4NYflO3-A16iG9lFlnmE1tQb8QCBtKbF8RVtnq1a0cTBHsWDIbV8blZyjWABaT6nVpGjAZC3go6UieQcWhv-lw%3D%3D)**.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cGP022_21vjcioLYOLpcxf_cB6y1Sn2qPhQSi36uwYny7JfzVdzfYXOgjKrOhWMm4_-sgwrANwVvJWwM2yqQpmg5fTKMZrbBmC8HMGpBVrY4cHNsmNebcA4FpqTNoSnCd1g6zkPc3Y3lQGad7i4ukBA5NwXP3DgMo3qkZcA5zBcKrf-Gdo8bUXvOqJ286Sb4tgMi3qxAszH-CXLHLab5yajIsH5SS3xu_fgRLcR5XoZ06za7d1eaB477u9YJm4g9A%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_U7kJQdz3eoftMb7hoV0-WMMEolBL506sZkHpmM7rDxLrTZyUKrPaKCFAaAhbhUL4NxAgcusRgPw0tz2rXkoHEvWOUfv-zWWA4PwA0PaMJ-MrlBg3FpsbXZ-zDqZ8vyo5zTDTiCgh-Rjf3lPCQxlokxhen85IP9b8_d_a4pVaRzxUJU0GnjzOXPjNhqut2faiOGiYhwr74rjANKkDdNfHVn8FROoQo3LUvdyPUiCWlgtXpEzNBtSVPAXpq6IJbgvmg%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=r9JV9YXPHxzD7c_rgTQy3cJ0wt6gMb3-gAfOpGdz7Jps0IbSmXKZs1upbd2aPac2cvQAL2wevd68h6ty-sjFiWjUx2uBPgkkzILd93Z29AV8_LKR52m0OA5SEtKLlrx6D8EYDF2puN1BV5WAKKukM0a9ePGxDpZAPcEY6hqXJCrQzLl9fIQqiMUIugbh8XWqQamk_qEYKLEnUehhHATlfia7KMI3uAZLk_cjgo3uam8mJkYpWCQUgUz2S84wm-9n). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_fdAbO70kLK6h3kV7uPXtjUwBlf6LkSyfOFODuJ7qtk-Pin9Brq1zIgpEpibMwlxERwgAFHpCuS9Kjx9z6z00SwBz0ZqO1ATIQTjWwhhTCwUbsuVLyh31g8HeuM1ZNA68LVUcHVt0kOHJhvBkGotaplq6aAF4R6X1iBglptN3-hGlzEeenxMX7kkLC3ukNtdCM39oyVq3RxBv4dDYUJoSYyd8w0ktCNwOsAUzsSnPMK6RJ-tks9ZKVt6BgDtouf7fHajkJRQ6_p6hY_j9FuKlO4z6Bk7-kupbt_fyZo7g74xsCDmX9pztGTRWOjdMIRwvh2fcGW5SZviIYPiyZdTBDPZI7s26TcdmrI-dGcueJhh) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_fdAbO70kLK6h3kV7uPXtjVe9GrlKFToWtD_XFjurXwuFez7kb3gNzfBcLCCZzHfNQxenFhFR6YxI_VTNCVnbdWjdq6uR3gf-zg9BWZAdRzdRwVC7cRu0Qipv0mxXe8eH9-EiO34JD9I398Q7JMpSLxWacSnAHRrR0kUMH-txlVlqKB9BTxZ0U-qAZ3_grKBOzHijIET-hxEC6T1bq2ye6zbs1K99dyn3p6sYHjLzZbEvJpLCB1ZxATkdfkmbyrN18nVHLOYEgsSLoBYXChWG5Fl0osfI4ygP1aoabzLPtcbpb-kN7zMuzA5nejhq82JVkjhhDI8ZooegNoFUc1iWKHqJ_v_iM3UYxv8qYnUHiTK) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_cGP022_21vjcioLYOLpcxf_cB6y1Sn2qPhQSi36uwYnuckwBIFWTHylyOD0M3CgzG0RC8Rzoj0LHcpvdyrpSzVUzlldCVEPfMA40v225Ae1KF-7lsUWDlRFT4CgFi4ZGATdfVwPXDJ3pSPWS6-zZ3ZIxP_jG3rURoOp2aHHBtpZx0r99JW08WqW01ELlz7BV4QXA9kWhikiNF8GgltdmM_OU5s1YhYvGybrQFfvNyeeWjGR5Dnnlf_doMSvXWsDlQ%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_U7kJQdz3eoftMb7hoV0-WMMEolBL506sZkHpmM7rDxLuO7_pqt6jTzX1t5RBSIJG9H4PfLM6PMx5vSoaCLnpBwNjU_Ur2JrQq2OZ5cSvc5noytmzzG5TYMzHFx1Qmyc1IBbUypodrnawxRivLdNoKRhpFwf4Ba6sBJZqWqB7WjHVVelcF6RHwqK8Nefo1ulx-o4ssti05SgwsEZ4djR1H9K0xz14oUBhNACFZz8gmeHTLqAi2i8uDVQaBb3nEoRDg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_SITH8GkMHb8CVqzx6c-Ud1BzSXWh81EfVe_KTIZVUhjC6VnZJ4r2IfjoNslObhNl42_EML4taWxV3Xhr2_cnN-lCAoQC20z0lOplYqn8E6YCLo3Te8pntngerubrbd_rAHd9W8TUj76rTyeLpHKN8PrQDDgmANT7SAYJRFEgsRqv7aNC7Xm8fCN1xk3PQfxuV6FRLwV1x9_rbj3QdyInA9JHW4CagsC2BjXnHY0deT5UffnAxqRZ1H-5v5mwb2EBA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=DG_JKMCu6beeffzYbNoT_fdAbO70kLK6h3kV7uPXtjXTgyGzodykrF_yA23ATxZTcZ-t602bhcboFMQ0LjEMY0bZHmO7ZbZpJRkda-4mCSVoylpKHXjKipAtbCHBVxaEepBXnj8otMBzTcCNTmU1kNQehFYuNVP7eLwPmmNepB6-vm4-tCQwb_8RzUds1GbvECUeIaI7HuRqNEXNi61M3gPmt-aWplh9FrT22WaddJOKPw_AlLwm8_Iery3sa2PJJncH0tC3T_p9fe4IVQWWv1Iz9ONlLQtEmuz_JQQ61ACDlBW9TUetXl1K7OpsZKn7_97GV9OCt87bHr25cEA9AXRBd0TQ95hCRq7oAL4dLLr2Q0aAlQaowAM2r6-ZZnT7G54erlkuSyoOqoyFJUajXg%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=r9JV9YXPHxzD7c_rgTQy3cJ0wt6gMb3-gAfOpGdz7Jps0IbSmXKZs1upbd2aPac2cvQAL2wevd68h6ty-sjFiWjUx2uBPgkkzILd93Z29AV8_LKR52m0OA5SEtKLlrx6D8EYDF2puN1BV5WAKKukM0a9ePGxDpZAPcEY6hqXJCrQzLl9fIQqiMUIugbh8XWqQamk_qEYKLEnUehhHATlfia7KMI3uAZLk_cjgo3uam8mJkYpWCQUgUz2S84wm-9n) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c7e3223a5b14410b9b4d832d4905c703&_e=r9JV9YXPHxzD7c_rgTQy3cJ0wt6gMb3-gAfOpGdz7Jps0IbSmXKZs1upbd2aPac2cvQAL2wevd68h6ty-sjFiWjUx2uBPgkkzILd93Z29AV8_LKR52m0OA5SEtKLlrx6D8EYDF2puN1BV5WAKKukM0a9ePGxDpZAPcEY6hqXJCrQzLl9fIQqiMUIugbh8XWqQamk_qEYKLEnUehhHATlfia7KMI3uAZLk_cjgo3uam8mJkYpWCQUgUz2S84wm-9n) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Tonight is the big night, and Leah is getting ready to take the stage. I wanted to make sure you saw her note during debate prep. Friend, Tonight is the big night, and Leah is getting ready to take the stage. I wanted to make sure you saw her note during debate prep. While we received a great show of support, I want to give Leah an extra boost before she takes the stage. My plan is to show her the list of supporters who respond to this email as we make our way from the debate prep room to the stage. Tonight is huge, friend. Leah will set herself apart as the only candidate capable of beating Senator Baldwin and saving our state from a SIX-YEAR TERM of far-left policies. Showing Leah that you’re with her tonight could make all the difference. Jess Ward Campaign Manager Leah for Senate \-----Forwarded Message Below------ Friend, I’m taking a break from debate prep to reach out to you. You’ve been with me all the way, friend, and your support has made all the difference in this race. But we’ve reached a very critical point. This upcoming debate will show all of Wisconsin who is the strongest candidate to take on Tammy Baldwin. So Friend, another term for Tammy Baldwin in the Senate would be a nightmare not only for our state, but our country. She’s owned by the liberal elite, peddling their dangerous agenda, and I know I am the best person to stop her. When I take the stage, I’ll be picturing the terrible future we would have if Tammy Baldwin continues to represent us in the U.S. Senate. I’ll think of the countless Wisconsin families depending on a real fighter in the Senate – and I’ll share my plan for a great America. But first, I need to know that you’re with me. Then, we can win this fight and beat Tammy. Thanks, Leah P.S. I hope you’ll watch tonight’s debate. Find out how . Paid for by Leah for Senate

You're probably getting sick and tired of hearing about the dirty tricks coming from Republican legislative leaders.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b3f/2fde7c66/493633d4/156818a0/1764262360/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-july-eom?gpsid=8_43_2333&refcode=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")

Friend,

You're probably getting sick and tired of hearing about the dirty tricks coming from Republican legislative leaders.

I know I am.

But I'm here to tell you what we're going to do about it.

Last weekend, our grassroots organizing team at Break the Majority launched their first Weekend of Action. Working with volunteers across the state, we knocked on almost 10,000 doors.

This is our key to winning in November: grassroots organizing.

**[Here's the thing, though. Grassroots organizing costs money -- and our goal is to raise $15,000 before our end-of-July deadline. Chip in before the deadline to help us hit our goal:](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b3f/2fde7c66/493633d4/156818a3/1764262360/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-july-eom?gpsid=8_43_2333&refcode=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=2+-+Heres+the+thing+though+Grassroots+organi")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b3f/2fde7c66/493633d4/156818a2/1764262360/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-july-eom?gpsid=8_43_2333&refcode=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_content=3+-++ask++raquo")

Look, friends: November is coming.

If our legislative leaders aren't willing to work with their constituents' best interests in mind, then we need to replace them with people who will. And I've got a whole list of candidates I think can get that job done.

For the first time ever, we've got Democrats running in each district across the state. We know there is more enthusiasm on our side -- but we aren't taking anything for granted.

**[We can be successful in November, but we need your help now. Chip in before the deadline if you can.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b3f/2fde7c66/493633d4/156818a6/1764262360/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-july-eom?gpsid=8_43_2333&refcode=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_eom1_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&utm_content=7+-+We+can+be+successful+in+November+but+we+")**

Thanks for your continued support,

Roy
